channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Party trays, meal kits sold in Utah recalled over cucumber-related Salmonella concerns
item.description: Multiple companies have issued recalls of products sold across the nation and in Utah after potential exposure to Salmonella through now-recalled cucumbers.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard, Trump's pick for intel chief, faces questions on Capitol Hill amid Syria fallout
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s pick for intelligence chief, Tulsi Gabbard, is making her case on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Mascaro And Farnoush Amiri, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Biden creates Native American boarding school national monument to mark era of forced assimilation
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — President Joe Biden designated a national monument at a former Native American boarding school in Pennsylvania on Monday to honor the resilience of Indigenous tribes whose children were forced to attend the school and hundreds of similar abusive institutions.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW BROWN and MARC LEVY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Who is Luigi Mangione? Police arrest person of interest in CEO killing
item.description: A man arrested in connection with the fatal shooting of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson has been identified as Luigi Mangione, officials said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Cook, KTLA 5

item.title: 6 Guatemalans arrested and charged with human smuggling in deadly 2021 Mexico truck crash
item.description: United States and Guatemalan authorities have announced the arrest of six people charged with human smuggling linked to a semi-trailer truck crash in Mexico in 2021 that killed more than 50 migrants.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO was likely killed with a ghost gun that can be made at home
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The brazen killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO was likely carried out with a ghost gun, one of the nearly untraceable weapons that can be made a home, police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Military pauses Osprey flights again after more metal failures are found in near crash in November
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Pentagon is temporarily pausing flights again of its fleet of V-22 Ospreys after weakened metal components possibly played a role in another near crash, the latest setback for an embattled aircraft whose safety problems have grown.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: These states have the highest — and lowest — median salary: new data
item.description: New data released by a payroll site found median annual salaries from $40,000 to over six figures across the country.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge dismisses charges against Karen Read supporter who scattered rubber ducks and fake $100 bills
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — A Massachusetts judge dismissed criminal charges Monday against a backer of Karen Read who admitted placing dozens of yellow rubber ducks and fake $100 bills around town in support of Read. Richard Schiffer Jr.
item.dc:creator: STEVE LeBLANC, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tiffany Henyard files lawsuit against political rival, rallies supporters following caucus
item.description: "What happened to us on Dec. 3 was sort of fairness," Henyard said. "We didn't have our opportunity to be heard.
item.dc:creator: Emmy Victor, NewsNation

item.title: Who could see a white Christmas? Map shows which areas in California have best chance of snow
item.description: AccuWeather analyzed historical weather data between 1991 and 2020 to determine which areas of the country have the best odds of seeing a snowy Christmas.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TikTok asks federal appeals court to bar enforcement of potential ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: TikTok asked a federal appeals court on Monday to bar the Biden administration from enforcing a law that could lead to a ban on the popular platform until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge to the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Daniel Penny acquitted in NYC subway chokehold case over Jordan Neely's death
item.description: A Marine veteran who used a chokehold on an agitated subway rider was acquitted on Monday in a death that became a prism for differing views about public safety, valor and vigilantism.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: Oldest known stone tablet inscribed with Ten Commandments to be auctioned
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The oldest known stone tablet inscribed with the Ten Commandments, dating from 300 to 800 A.D., will be sold in New York this month, Sotheby's auction house said. The 155-pound (52-kilogram) marble slab inscribed with the commandments in Paleo-Hebrew script will be auctioned on Dec.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO killing: Man with gun, fake ID, large sum of cash arrested in Pennsylvania
item.description: A man in Pennsylvania has been arrested in connection with the fatal shooting of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, officials said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey becomes latest state to prohibit bans on books in school, public libraries
item.description: New Jersey Democratic Gov. Phil Murphy has signed a law to prohibit book bans in the state and enshrine protections against civil and criminal charges for librarians who comply with the law.
item.dc:creator: Mike Catalini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rare cloud formation spotted in Tennessee
item.description: NewsNation affiliate WJHL viewers captured stunning, rare clouds in the Tri-Cities area of Tennessee on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Faith Little, NewsNation

item.title: Gas prices drop to lowest in 3 years, AAA says
item.description: Good news for the millions of drivers on American roads: gas prices are falling. The national average for a gallon of gas has hit a three-year low, the American Automobile Association (AAA) recently announced.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, WGN 9

item.title: Lara Trump stepping down from RNC amid Senate speculation
item.description: Lara Trump is stepping down as co-chair of the Republican National Committee (RNC) as she considers replacing Florida Sen. Marco Rubio (R), whom her father-in-law, President-elect Donald Trump, picked to be secretary of State.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, ABC 4

item.title: Stolen ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in 'The Wizard of Oz' are auctioned for $28 million
item.description: A pair of iconic ruby slippers that were worn by Judy Garland in “The Wizard of Oz” and stolen from a museum nearly two decades ago sold for a winning bid of $28 million at auction Saturday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI and HANNAH FINGERHUT Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO murder sends executives scrambling to hire security: experts
item.description: Security experts told Fox News Digital that the Wednesday assassination of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson has already stirred up a heightened focus on executive security.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers reach $17M, 1-year deal with Conforto and $22M, 2-year contract with Treinen, AP sources say
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers agreed to a $17 million, one-year contract to add outfielder Michael Conforto and a $22 million, two-year deal to retain right-hander Blake Treinen, people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Darnold delivers for Vikings with career-high 347 yards and 5 TDs to beat Falcons, Cousins 42-21
item.description: Darnold added yet another highlight to his brilliant first season with the Vikings, passing for 347 yards and five touchdowns, both career highs, in a 42-21 victory over the foundering Falcons on Sunday to stretch their winning streak to six games.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Woman, 52, accused of robbing Billie Eilish fans at knifepoint near Oregon arena
item.description: "She had a knife under her shirt. My mom saw it, and (the woman) was kind of taunting us." a fan recounted.
item.dc:creator: Tim Steele, NewsNation

item.title: Trump says he can't guarantee tariffs won't raise US prices and won't rule out revenge prosecutions
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump said he can't guarantee that his promised tariffs on key U.S. foreign trade partners won't raise prices for American consumers and he suggested once more that some political rivals and federal officials who pursued legal cases against him should be imprisoned.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump's 'Meet the Press' interview
item.description: President-elect Trump's first sit-down interview since winning a second White House term aired Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Netflix must pay $385K to woman exposed as fertility doctor's secret child: court
item.description: A federal court in Indianapolis has ordered Netflix to pay $385,000 to an Indiana woman it outed as the daughter of Donald Cline, a former fertility doctor who secretly used his own sperm to inseminate patients.
item.dc:creator: Austin Hanson, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio bill would require high-demand liquor bottles to be opened when sold
item.description: The bill aims to combat "flippers" who quickly buy up the limited supply of highly sought-after spirits in Ohio to illegally resell them on a secondary market for significantly more than what they paid.
item.dc:creator: Ava Boldizar, Fox 5

item.title: Why work-life balance isn't working for women
item.description: About half of working women reported feeling stressed “a lot of the day," compared to about 4 in 10 men, according to a Gallup report published this week.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: FBI releases new poster, photos of UnitedHealthcare CEO murder suspect
item.description: The FBI revealed a new wanted poster for the suspect in the murder case for UnitedHealthCare CEO Brian Thompson.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Check your junk mail: Some affected by the Equifax data breach to get more money
item.description: Customers affected by Equifax credit monitoring agency’s 2017 data breach may be eligible for another payment.
item.dc:creator: Katie Millard, KRON4

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O'Neill, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Saturday on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5
